Paper_Metadata.Paper_Title: Electron beam powder bed fusion of Y₂O₃/\gamma-TiAl nanocomposite with balanced strength and toughness

Composition_Info.Note: Base powder Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb (45-150 um) mixed with 0.4 wt% Y2O3 nanoparticles (~30 nm); Al concentration measured as 46.3 at% in bulk sample

Process_Text.original: Electron beam powder bed fusion (PBF-EB) on Arcam A2XX machine using multi-spot melt strategy. Process parameters: scanning speed 600 mm/s, beam current 25 mA, line offset 0.5 mm, focus offset 0 mA, line energy 2.5 J/mm, spot number 50, spot time 0.8 ms, minimum distance per spot 4 mm. Layer thickness: 70 um. Build temperature: 1160 C. Vacuum: 1x10^-2 mbar with high purity helium as regulating gas. Multiple closed loops along perimeter on x-y plane with dummy scan upon completion of each loop. 90 degree scan rotation between layers.
Process_Text.simplified: PBF-EB multi-spot melt strategy; layer thickness 70 um; build temp 1160 C; line energy 2.5 J/mm; spot time 0.8 ms

Microstructure_Text.original: Duplex microstructure consisting of alpha2/gamma lamellar colonies, equiaxed gamma and B2 grains. Lamellar spacing 208 +/- 72 nm with straight alpha2/gamma interface. Uniform distribution of Y2O3 nanoparticles without agglomeration. Twins and dislocations observed in equiaxed gamma grains. Stacking faults at twin interface suggesting dislocation slip on consecutive {111}gamma plane. Secondary twinning observed at twin intersections. Twins develop within gamma lamellae and propagate across twin interface but terminate at gamma/alpha2 interface. Rod-like Y2O3 (monoclinic) and spherical Y2O3 (cubic) identified by TEM/SADP/FFT. Clean Y2O3/TiAl interface free of interfacial reactions with semi-coherent or coherent type.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Duplex microstructure (lamellar colonies + equiaxed gamma/B2 grains); fine lamellar spacing 208 nm; straight alpha2/gamma interfaces; uniform Y2O3 distribution; mechanical twins in gamma phase; two Y2O3 morphologies (rod-like monoclinic, spherical cubic)

Process_Text.original: Electron beam powder bed fusion (PBF-EB) on Arcam A2XX machine using multi-spot melt strategy. Process parameters: scanning speed 600 mm/s, beam current 25 mA, line offset 0.5 mm, focus offset 0 mA, line energy 2.5 J/mm, spot number 50, spot time 0.8 ms, minimum distance per spot 4 mm. Layer thickness: 90 um. Build temperature: 1160 C. Vacuum: 1x10^-2 mbar with high purity helium as regulating gas. Multiple closed loops along perimeter on x-y plane with dummy scan upon completion of each loop.
Process_Text.simplified: PBF-EB multi-spot melt strategy; layer thickness 90 um; build temp 1160 C; line energy 2.5 J/mm; spot time 0.8 ms

Microstructure_Text.original: Duplex microstructure with fully lamellar top layer transitioning to duplex bulk. alpha2 lamellae decomposition observed in bulk region. gamma grains near-equiaxed shape in bulk. Coarser lamellar spacing (~710 nm step width) compared to L70 (~160 nm). Lamellar colony fraction reduces from 100% (top) to 59+/-11% in upper region. Lower aspect ratio (31+/-13) of gamma lamellae than L70 (114+/-38). Higher degradation at colony boundaries via spheroidization mechanism.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Duplex microstructure; coarser lamellae than L70; significant alpha2 decomposition; near-equiaxed gamma grains; lower alpha2 fraction (12%) than L70 (50%)

Composition_Info.Note: Base powder Ti-48Al-2Cr-2Nb (45-150 um) mixed with 0.4 wt% Y2O3 nanoparticles (~30 nm); Al concentration measured as 46.5 at%; hatch melt reference condition

Process_Text.original: Electron beam powder bed fusion (PBF-EB) on Arcam A2XX machine using conventional hatch melt strategy. Process parameters: scanning speed 2400 mm/s, beam current 8 mA, line offset 0.1 mm, focus offset 0 mA, line energy 0.2 J/mm. Layer thickness: 70 um. Build temperature: 1160 C. Vacuum: 1x10^-2 mbar with high purity helium as regulating gas. Three outlines with 0.5 mm offset for contour melt. Snake-like back-and-forth hatch pattern with 90 degree scan rotation between layers.
Process_Text.simplified: PBF-EB hatch melt strategy (reference); layer thickness 70 um; build temp 1160 C; line energy 0.2 J/mm; snake-like scan pattern

Microstructure_Text.original: Duplex microstructure with higher gamma-phase fraction than multi-spot sample. Lack-of-fusion defects and pores with defect area fraction 1.6%. Higher gamma-phase and B2-phase fractions. Coarser lamellar spacing (959 +/- 155 nm) with straight interface. Larger nanoparticle size (218 +/- 113 nm) with chain-like distribution pattern. Dislocations blocked by twins and grain boundaries. Parallel dislocation arrangement suggesting twin formation via dislocation pile-up. Dislocation sub-grain boundary within gamma lamellae indicating recovery and recrystallization.
Microstructure_Text.simplified: Duplex microstructure; lack-of-fusion defects (1.6%); coarse lamellae (959 nm); chain-like Y2O3 distribution; dislocation activity; recovery/recrystallization in gamma

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: Defect area fraction measured by Olympus LEXT OLS4000 3D laser confocal microscope; lack-of-fusion defects and pores
Properties_Info.Note: Hatch melt sample; lower densification than multi-spot sample; Y2O3 addition impacts melting/solidification behavior

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: TEM image analysis
Properties_Info.Note: alpha2/gamma lamellar spacing; straight interface; much coarser than multi-spot sample (208 +/- 72 nm)

Properties_Info.Test_Condition: SEM image analysis via ImageJ; chain-like particle arrangement
Properties_Info.Note: Number density: 0.09 +/- 0.03 um^-2; volume fraction: 0.9 +/- 0.4%; larger and less uniform than multi-spot sample (90 +/- 38 nm)
